ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microbes" (
  "microbe_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each microbial species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Name of the microbial species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the microbial species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the microbial species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the microbial species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the microbial species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the microbial species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the microbial species */,
  "decontam_freq" REAL /* Frequency of the species in decontam analysis */,
  "decontam_prev" INTEGER /* Prevalence of the species in decontam analysis */,
  "decontam_p_freq" REAL /* p-value frequency of the species in decontam analysis */,
  "decontam_predicted_contaminant" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is predicted to be a contaminant */,
  "shared_with_wis" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is shared with the Weizmann Institute of Science */,
  "in_hmp_gut_mycobiome_metagenomic_data" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the species is in HMP gut mycobiome metagenomic data */,
  "known_human_association_literature" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if there is known human association literature for the species */,
  "comments_and_literature" TEXT /* Comments and literature references for the species */,
  "isolation_date" TEXT /* Date the species was isolated */,
  "geographical_origin" TEXT /* Geographical origin of the species */,
  "source_material" TEXT /* Source material from which the species was isolated */,
  "metagenomic_analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for metagenomic analysis */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Sequencing platform used for analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microbe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the research organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "publications_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the organization */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "major_research_areas" TEXT /* Major research areas of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization conducting the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the project */,
  "project_publications" TEXT /* List of publications related to the project */,
  "project_data_access_type" TEXT /* Type of data access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES research_organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "readme_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset readme file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_publication_date" TEXT /* Date the data was published */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is shared */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microbe_datasets" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "microbe_id" TEXT /* ID of the microbial species */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the microbial species in the dataset */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the species */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Score indicating the confidence in the detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microbe_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microbe_datasets_microbe_id FOREIGN KEY ("microbe_id") REFERENCES microbes ("microbe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in days */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in days */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference */,
  "microbe_id" TEXT /* ID of the microbial species */,
  "reference_pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the reference */,
  "reference_title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to the reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literature_references_microbe_id FOREIGN KEY ("microbe_id") REFERENCES microbes ("microbe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "microbe_id" TEXT /* ID of the microbial species */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_microbe_id FOREIGN KEY ("microbe_id") REFERENCES microbes ("microbe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
